assertions: VAL-DESKTOP-001: Authenticated users reach a real desktop shell
VAL-DESKTOP-002: App launcher opens E-Text inside the desktop
VAL-DESKTOP-003: Window focus changes raise the active window
VAL-DESKTOP-004: Windows support drag and resize
VAL-DESKTOP-005: Windows support minimize, maximize, and restore
VAL-DESKTOP-006: Window close and reopen updates desktop state cleanly
VAL-DESKTOP-007: Desktop restore preserves server-backed window state
VAL-ETEXT-001: User can create a document
VAL-ETEXT-002: Direct user edits create canonical user-authored revisions
VAL-ETEXT-003: Agent revision creates canonical appagent-authored revisions
VAL-ETEXT-004: Revision progress and completion update the open document without manual refresh
VAL-ETEXT-005: Latest revision survives reload and fresh auth session
VAL-ETEXT-006: Version history lists revisions with explicit attribution metadata
VAL-ETEXT-007: Historical snapshots can be opened without mutating head
VAL-ETEXT-008: Diff view compares selected revisions and changed sections
VAL-ETEXT-009: Blame identifies the last editor per section
VAL-ETEXT-010: Citations and metadata persist with document history
VAL-CROSS-119: One end-to-end e-text flow preserves user and appagent attribution
VAL-CROSS-120: Background worker output never appears as a direct canonical author
VAL-CROSS-122: Renewal and retries do not duplicate canonical document mutation
